Title: Research Fellow — FARADAI Project
Org Line: Link Campus University · Supervisor: Prof. Marco Angelini
Description: EDF 20/21 FARADAI: Frugal and Robust AI for Defence Advanced Intelligence.
Bullets:
Development of robust and efficient AI systems for advanced intelligence applications in the defense sector
Frugal AI systems capable of operating effectively with limited training data
Transparent and explainable AI (XAI) systems applied to complex and dynamic contexts

Title: XAIber-Lab Research Center
Org Line: Università degli Studi di Roma Link · Director: Prof. Marco Angelini
Bullets:
